author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
śrī-kṛṣṇa-virahe, rādhikāra daśā,
āmi ta’ sahite nāri
jugala⋅milana, sukhera kāraṇa,
jīvana chāḍite pāri

rādhikā⋅caraṇa, tyajiyā āmāra,
kṣaṇeke pralaya haya
rādhikāra tare, śatabāra mari,
se⋅duḥkha āmāra saya

e hena rādhāra, caraṇa⋅yugale,
paricaryā pā’ba kabe
hā hā vraja⋅jana, more dayā kari’,
kabe vraja-vane la’be

vilāsa-mañjarī, anaṅgamañjarī,
śrī⋅rūpamañjarī āra
āmāke tuliyā, laha nija-pade,
deha mora siddhi⋅sāra
en_translation:
The condition of Rādhikā in separation from Śrī Kṛṣṇa - I cannot tolerate it. For the sake of the happiness of the divine couple's union, I can give up my life.

Abandoning Rādhikā's feet even for a moment, is a great distress for me. For Rādhikā's sake, I can die a hundred times; I will endure that agony.

When will I attain the service At the lotus feet of such a Rādhā? Alas, alas, O people of Vraja, showing mercy to me, When will you take me to the forest of Vraja?

O Vilāsa Mañjarī, Anaṅga Mañjarī, And Śrī Rūpa Mañjarī, Please lift me up and take me to your feet, Grant me the essence of ultimate perfection.
